subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Thy letter of victory arrived on the most auspicious of days, though it hath been some time since [we corresponded] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله نامه فیروز در بهترین روز وصول یافت هر چند مدتی بود که با تو
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
